div.h4: [IN RESPECT OF THE PREMISES SITUATED AT [FLOOR], [SUB PROPERTY],[MAIN PROPERTY WITH ADDRESS].

div.div: THIS LEASE AGREEMENT is made this________day of________, 2023
div.p: [LANDLORD] , a limited liability company incorporated in the United Republic of Tanzania whose address for the purposes hereof is [Landlord Address] (hereinafter referred to as “Lessor” which expression shall include, where the context so admits, successors and assignees in title) of the One Part.

[TANENT], a company incorporated in the United Republic of Tanzania, Dar Es Salaam, Tanzania, (hereinafter referred to as “Lessee”) which expression shall include, where the context so admits, successors and assignees in title of the Other Part.
A.The Lessor is the lawful owner of all Premises styled as the [Floor], [Main Property with Address].
B.The Lessee desires to lease the said premises from the Lessor and the Lessor agrees to Lease the same for commercial use only.

1.1In this Lease Agreement unless the context otherwise provides: - “Agreement" shall mean this Lease Agreement and shall include rules and regulations, annexures and any amendments or other novation agreed and duly signed and executed by the Parties in accordance with the terms of this Agreement.

td.p: shall mean privileged information shared between the Parties hereto relating to their business or supplied by any party during their communication
shall mean property situated on the [Floor] of [Main Property Name] having approximate area of [Rented Area] Sqm.

shall mean any renovations, fittings, decorations, or Furnishings carried out by either the Lessor or the Lessor’s contractor at Lessee’s cost or carried out by the Lessee at its costs upon consent from Lessor.
means the demised Premises constituting [Rented Area in words] square meters ([Rented Area]) on the [Floor] of the Property.

means Consideration that lessee has to pay to lessor against leasing demised Premises constituting [Rented Area in words] square meters ([Rented Area]) on the [Floor] of the Property [Main Property Name].
shall mean [Main Property Name], Building located on [Main Property Address].
shall mean monthly property management charges.
Payment period from the date of issuing the invoice.
shall mean United States Dollars equivalent to Tanzania Shillings (USD to TSH) at prevailing exchange rate stated in the invoice.

div.p: (a)Reference to singular include, where the context so admits, references to the plural and vice versa and references to Clauses are references to Clauses of this Agreement.
(b)Words importing the masculine gender shall include the feminine gender and vice-versa and words importing persons shall include companies.

(c)In case any of the provisions of this Agreement shall for any reason be held to be invalid, illegal or unenforceable, then such provision shall be deemed to never have existed and in such scenario, the Parties shall apply their joint input and efforts to achieve the purpose of such provision by amending the same.

3.1The period of tenancy herein referred to as the “Contractual Period” shall be for [Contract Years in Word] ([Contract Years]) years, commencing from [Start Date(dd mmm yyyy) format] to [End Date(dd mmm yyyy) format].
3.2The Contractual Period can further be renewed for another term subject to the terms and conditions to be agreed by the Parties.
(i)The Lessee shall pay a total monthly Rent for [Rented Area] sqm as agreed below:

United States Dollar [Rent/Sq. M in word] ([Rent/Sq. M]) per sqm + Vat, Amounting to United States Dollar [Rent/Month in words] Only ([Rent/Month]) + Vat per month and Totaling to United States Dollar [Rent/Month in words X Payment Terms] Only ([Rent/Month]) + Vat per annum.
The above rental amount is quoted in USD equivalent to Tanzania Shillings at the prevailing exchange rate as shown in the invoice at the time of payment.

Monthly Service charge shall be paid as per the attached Property Management Agreement herein attached to form part of this Agreement which shall be levied by the Property Management entity duly appointed by the Lessor.

Rent and Service charges shall be paid One month in advance on the first day of every calendar Month and strictly within 7 days upon the Lessee's receipt of an invoice. Payment shall be made into the bank account of the Lessor,
Account No. (USD) held with Bank or Account No. (TZS) held with Bank, in the names of the Lessor.
Any changes to payment account shall be communicated to the Lessee before the next payment due date.

strong.span: Moneys due and owing and Interest

div.p: In the event that Lessee delays to pay rent or service charges on the date due, the Lessor shall impose interest @ [Late Payment Interest %] % per month from the date of the amount being due until payment of such money in full and shall together with the principal amount be recoverable in like manner as rent in arrears.
In the event the rent is delayed for a period of one months at any given time, the Lessor shall be entitled to serve the Lessee a 30-day termination notice to the Lessee.
That upon expiry of the 30-day termination Notice the Lessor shall be entitled to take full possession of the demised premises without further notice to the Lessee.

4.3.2.(i)The Lessee shall be responsible to deduct and pay Withholding Tax on this Agreement within fourteen (14) days of the said taxes becoming due and payable and shall avail the evidence of such payment to the Lessor within Fourteen (14 ) days.

4.3.2.(ii)In addition, the Lessee shall pay the requisite stamp duty on this Agreement. In the event that the Lessee fails to pay the stamp duty on this Agreement, the Lessor shall have a right, at its option, to pay the stamp duty on this Agreement, and invoice the Lessee for the costs and expenses incurred by the Lessor.

The Lessee shall pay a security deposit for performance of obligations under this Agreement to the tune of [Security Deposit]. which shall be refunded at the end of this Agreement or upon termination subject to deductions related to damages to the demised premises, rent due or other damages or liabilities that may have accrued.

4.4.1The Lessor shall refund the Security Deposit at the end of this Agreement or upon termination of this Agreement subject to ensuring that the Demised Premises are in the order they were handed over at the commencement of this Agreement and after assessing and deducting any rent or costs for damages that might have accrued during the period.
Rent review shall be done after the end of the contractual period upon further renewal for another term and rent will escalate to meet the minimum market trend.

strong.span: Covenants of the Lessee to Lessor.

div.p: 5.2To be responsible and to indemnify the Lessor against any damages or liabilities that may be occasioned to the Demised Premises by any act of default or negligence on the part of the Lessee, Lessee’s employees, agents, customers or persons acting under the instruction of the Lessee.
5.3Not to make any structural alterations or additions to the Demised Premises without the prior written consent of the Lessor which consent shall not be unreasonably withheld.
5.4To keep the Demised Premises including all structures, furnishing and fittings in good repairable condition with fair wear and tear accepted.
5.5Not to use the Demised Premises or any part thereof for unlawful or immoral act or Purpose.

5.6Not to keep any dog, cat or other animal, reptile, fish or bird in the Demised Premises without the prior written consent of the Lessor, and to keep the Premises free of pests, rodents, vermin and insects.

5.7Not to do or permit to be done any act or thing which may become a nuisance to or give cause for reasonable complaint from the occupants of the other parts of the building or to the lessees and occupiers of adjoining and neighboring properties.
5.8Not to hold in or on the Demised Premises any religious activities, exhibition, public meeting, or public entertainment.

5.9Not to permit or cause to be permitted the placing or parking of bicycles, motor cycles or scooters, trolleys and other wheeled vehicles and/or the stocking or storage or littering of goods or things in the Common Areas and to keep all such internal and external parts of the Building clear and free of all obstruction at all times.
5.10Not to place or take into the passenger lifts or escalators any baggage, parcels, sacks, bags or other goods save only for light articles such as briefcases, attached cases and handbags.
5.11Not to solicit business, display or distribute advertising materials in the car parks or other Common Areas, or in the public walkway outside the building.

5.12To observe and perform or cause to be observed and performed the rules and regulations from time to time made by the Lessor in connection with the orderly and proper use of the lobbies, corridors, staircases, lifts, hoists, lavatories and other Common Areas in the Building and access ways and service areas to the Building and also in connection with the proper management and security of the building.

5.13Not to permit trade vehicles while being used for the delivery to and picking up of goods from the Premises to be driven, parked or stopped at any place or within the building except within the loading bay of the Building and at such other place or places and at such time or times as the Lessor may specifically allow and the Lessee shall prohibit its employees, service suppliers and others over whom it may control from parking delivery vehicles during loading or unloading in any place other than the permitted areas, and from obstructing in any manner howsoever the entrances, exits, and driveways and the pedestrian footways in or to the Common Areas.
5.14Not to erect or install in the Demised Premises any machinery which causes fumes or vibration which can be smelled or felt outside the Demised Premises.

5.15To pay all fees, rates and charges for the use of water and sewage from DAWASCO or any other body that may be in force, electricity from TANESCO or any other power generating body that may be in force and Electricity from Generator (DG) in case of power failure in respect of Demised Premises during the said Lease period (If DG is offered by lessor). failure of which shall amount to non-provision of such services and any delay in payment within three days upon receipt of the notice shall attract an interest rate amounting to 10% of the amount delayed. (Amount in arrears).

In respect of this paragraph, Lessor reserves the right to terminate all Utility services if not paid for, within seven days of presenting the invoice and any due loss arising out of such disconnection shall not be the responsibility of the Lessor.

5.16 To avail the Demised Premises to the Lessor or its agents or nominees at the expiration of the Contractual Period in good and tenable condition (In the state it was before contractual period) in accordance with the covenants herein before contained allowing for normal wear and tear.

5.17 Not to hold the Lessor responsible for any loss or damage suffered by the Lessee due to failure, disconnection or otherwise lack of water or electricity to the Demised Premises. Provided that such lack of water or electricity has not arisen from the Lessor’s carelessness or negligence.

5.18 Not to keep or permit to be kept or use on the Demised Premises Petrol, any materials dangerous or explosive in nature or the keeping of which may contravene any law, Subject to the provisions of this Clause, the Lessee has an obligation to strictly observe the following.

(i) Maintenance of high-level degree of hygiene including the World Health Organization and the Ministry of health-Tanzania rules, regulations and directions on Corvid 19 prevention and other pandemics.

(ii)Should any infections illness transpire in or within the Premises to forthwith give written notice thereof to the Lessor, and to thoroughly fumigate and disinfect the Demised Premises at the Lessee's own costs and expense to the satisfaction of the Lessor and the relevant authorities.

(iii)Garbage collection and disposal to the disposal/collection bin, must be done hygienically, timely and on daily basis, and in a way that it shall not cause a nuisance/disturbance to the neighborhood, passersby, guests, and customers in the property. Failure of daily collection will result in penalties imposed by the Lessor to cover the cost incurred in collecting it. Proper waste management disposal/collection bins with lids shall be supplied by the Lessor and must be maintained in good hygienic condition on daily basis by the Lessee.
Lessee must not cause any land, roads or pavements abutting the Demised Premises to be untidy and shall not dump garbage, waste or any other materials on them.

This sub-clause precludes and or excludes the Lessee’s whose demised premises are in respect of the businesses’ of restaurants, cafeterias, hotels and supermarkets whereas in that case, all costs in respect of garbage collection shall be done by respective lessee at their own costs and liabilities with the respective Municipal government’s authorized garbage collectors.
(iv)Gas cylinder’s and other kitchen equipment’s must be safely arranged during storage and use.

(v)Electrical appliances such as sockets, electrical wires etc shall not be interfered with without approval from the Lessor and any rectification must be done by a registered electrician duly authorized by the Parties.

(vi)Firefighting and risk hazard laws and regulations of the United Republic of Tanzania must be strictly observed. Lessee shall always employ a qualified fire and safety officer, failure of which shall render the Lessor to offer those services at the Lessee’s Demised premises” and at the Lessee’s costs.

(vii)Not to install or erect any exterior lighting, shade, canopy or awning or other structure in front of or elsewhere outside the Demised Premises without the prior written consent of the Lessor and the approval of and/or licence(s) from the relevant authorities in relation thereto. All fees and other charges in connection therewith shall be paid by the Lessee.

(x)Before any safe, furniture, partition or fitting is moved into or out of the building, to give due notice of the intention to move the same to the Lessor and shall not move the same otherwise than under the supervision of the Lessor or its employee or agent and at a time approved of by the Lessor.
(xi)Health, safety & environment.

Lessee shall maintain its own fully documented environmental, health and safety policies and shall operate in accordance with those policies and indemnify the Lessor against any costs, claims and liabilities arising as a result of the breach of applicable laws referable to health, safety and environmental matters.

(xii)The Lessee must not cause any land, roads or pavements abutting the Demised Premises to be untidy and in particular, but without prejudice to the generality of the foregoing, must not deposit garbage, waste or any other materials on them.

Failure to observe the above shall amount to immediate termination of this Agreement without refund of advance rent paid and security deposit. This shall commence upon failure to rectify the defaults/defects and after lessor issuing and lapse of three days default notice of rectification to the Lessee. Lessor shall not be liable for damages or any claim from Lessee whatsoever by reason of such action.

6.1To always provide quiet enjoyment to the other neighborhood, tenants, Property managers and the Lessor by strictly avoiding any direct or indirect disturbance or nuisance arising from the Lessee’s Demised Premises, his employees, customers and any other person acting under Lessee’s instruction, following the above;
(i)Persons with indecent character and the use of the Demised Premise as a brothel is strictly not allowed.
(ii)Smoking and drinking of alcohol is only allowed on designated areas only.
(iii)Prohibited drugs are strictly not allowed in the entire Property.

6.2To permit the Lessor or its agents or servants by reasonable prior notice, and at all reasonable hours to enter and view the condition of the Demised Premises and in the event of any repairs being necessary to carry the same within a reasonable time of receiving a notice to do so.

6.3The Lessee hereby agrees and undertakes not to use the Demised Premises or any part thereof otherwise than for the Lessee's business under the business or trade name specified in this agreement or such other business or trade name as may be approved by the Lessor. Provided always that the Lessee shall not use the Demised Premises for the aforesaid purposes unless and until the Lessee have applied for and obtained the necessary permits, approval and licences from the relevant authorities as may be necessary or required by any applicable statute, rule, order, regulation or by-law, and all fees and other charges connected therewith shall have been paid by the Lessee.

6.4In the case of a company as the Lessee any misdemeanors or breaches of the occupants shall be automatically imputed upon the Lessee. Such breach includes those committed by the agents, and employees of the Lessee, whether intentionally, carelessly, or negligently.

The Lessee shall display or exhibit its name or its business or trade name on a signboard erected on or affixed to the exterior of the Demised Premises and capable of illumination by electrical or such other means as shall be approved by the Lessor. Such signboard and any other signs, lights, embellishments, names or notices shall be erected or affixed or exhibited only with the prior approval in writing of the Lessor as to design, quality, size, colour, appearance, type and location. The Lessee shall at its own cost keep such signboard always illuminated during the normal business hours and for such other hours as the Lessor may direct.

p.strong: Restriction on Use of Name of Building

div.p: The Lessee shall not, without the Lessor's prior written consent, use the name of the Building or any picture or likeness of the Building or the Premises in its company, business or trading name or for any advertising or purpose other than as the address and place of business of the Lessee.

p.strong: Voidance of policy and additional premium

div.p: Not to do or permit to be done anything whereby any insurance of the Demised Premises against loss or damage by fire in or other risks covered by the Lessor’s or Lessee’s insurance policy may become void or voidable or whereby the rate of premium for such insurance may be increased and, in such case, to reimburse the Lessor all such excess premium and to make good any losses suffered due to non-coverage of such occurrence.

9.1 To insure and keep insured its business, employees, invitees and the Demised Premises against loss or damage by fire or such other risk as are commonly insured with a recognized insurance company in Tanzania. The Lessor shall have the right to request for a copy of the insurance policy and the Lessee shall avail the same on demand.

10.1The Lessee hereby agrees and undertakes not to transfer, assign, sublet mortgage or encumber this Agreement or the Demised Premises or any part thereof and shall not license, part with or share possession or occupation of the whole or any part of the Premises or grant to third parties any rights over the Demised Premises without the prior written consent of the Lessor, For the purpose of this Clause, where the Lessee is a company, any amalgamation and/or reconstruction effected by the Lessee or any change in the majority or controlling shareholders of the Lessee shall be deemed an assignment of this Agreement. The Lessor shall be free (Without the Lessee's consent) to assign or transfer the whole or any part of this Agreement to any party as the Lessor deems fit.

10.2To pay for the fuel consumption of generator used when electricity from the national grid is interrupted on a pro-rata basis and upon issuance of a reasonable notice from the Lessor, failure of which shall amount to non- provision of such services.
10.3To engage security systems/personnel in respect of the Demised Premises at its own costs and/or expenses.

10.4Lessee shall not discharge into the pipes serving the Demised Premises any oil or grease or any dangerous objects or poisonous explosive matter or substance and to take all reasonable measures to ensure that any effluent so discharged into the pipes will not be corrosive or otherwise harmful to the pipes or cause obstruction or deposit in them.

All damage caused to the Property or any part thereof or to the lifts by the Lessee, or anyone on his behalf, by taking in or putting out any machinery, equipment, safe, furniture, goods or other articles, which produce concentrates, loadings to any part of the floors of the Property or causing the Demised Premises to a weight greater than the designated load shall be made good by the Lessee, or if the Lessor so elects, by the Lessor at the expense of the Lessee. The Lessee shall pay to the Lessor the costs of such repairs within seven (7) days of the Lessor notifying the Lessee of the amount thereof.

The Lessee shall not cease carrying on business in the Demised Premises or abandon the Demised Premises continuously for one (1) month without notifying the Lessor in writing for the reasons for such abandonment of Demised Premises and indicating the date upon which the Lessee intends to resume occupation. During the period that the Demised Premises shall remain unoccupied, the Lessee shall take care of the Demised Premises including making security arrangements as the Lessor shall reasonably require and the insurers shall require in order to protect the Demised Premises from vandalism, theft, damage or unlawful occupation or any material breakdown of the Demised Premises. Whatever occurs the Lessee shall have no claim against the Lessor.
The Lessee hereby agrees and undertakes as follows:
13.2To refer to the Property by its proper name wherever the Lessee designates or refers to the Property in any newspaper or other advertising stationery or other printed material.

13.3To be responsible for obtaining and keeping in force all governmental approvals, licenses and permits necessary for the conduct of its business at the Demised Premises and for ensuring that the terms and conditions of such approvals, licenses and permits are strictly adhered to and shall indemnify the Lessor against any consequences or proceedings arising from the Lessee's default in complying with the provisions of this Clause.

The Lessee shall, at all times during the term, promptly comply at the Lessee's expense with all such requirements as may be imposed on the occupier of the Demised Premises by any applicable statute, rule, order, regulation or by-law now or hereafter in force affecting or relating to the use of the Demised Premises, and forthwith on receipt by the Lessee of any notice, order, requisition or direction made or issued by any government or any statutory , public or municipal authority affecting the Premises or the occupier thereof, to give full particulars of such notice to the Lessor and to keep the Lessor indemnified in respect of all such matters referred to in this Clause

p.strong: Covenants of the Lessor to Lessee.

div.p: 15.1The Lessor shall permit the Lessee to peacefully and quietly hold and enjoy the Demised Premises without any interruption or disturbance from or by the Lessor or any person in the care of the Lessor including but not limited to suppliers, agents or employees of the Lessor.

15.2To insure and keep insured the Property, (except Lessee’s Properties, business and all that belonging or connected to lessee) against loss or damage by fire or such other risk as are commonly insured with a recognized insurance company in Tanzania.

15.3If at any time the Demised Premises are rendered unfit for use by accidental fire or other cause beyond the control of the Lessee, the Lessor shall allow the Lessee to apportion all or part of the said rent proportionate to the existence and duration of the damage until the Demised Premises shall be fit for use again.
15.4To pay all existing and future land rents, property taxes and all dues in respect of the Property as stipulated by law, regulations and Municipal by-laws.
15.5To ensure the common area generator operation, repairs and routine maintenance are timely done.

If during the Term the whole or any part of the Building shall be destroyed or damaged by fire, water, riot, civil commotion, acts of terrorism or any other cause beyond the control of the Lessor (except where such damage or destruction has been caused by, or the policy or policies of insurance in relation to the Demised Premises shall have been vitiated or payment of the policy moneys withheld in whole or in part in consequence of some act or default of the Lessee or by any of the Lessee's employees, contractors, agents sub-lessees, invitees or licensees) so as to render the Demised Premises substantially unfit for the use or occupation of the Lessee or so as to deprive the Lessee of substantial use of the Demised Premises, the Rent and Service Charge reserved by this Agreement or a fair and just proportion thereof according to the nature and extent of the damage sustained shall be suspended until the Demised Premises shall again be rendered fit for occupation and use.

The rules and regulations relating to the Property and the Demised Premises set out in Schedule 1 (including any amendment or modification thereof by the Lessor from time to time) are deemed to form part of this Agreement and the Lessee covenants to observe and comply with such rules and regulations. The failure by the Lessee to keep and observe all such rules and regulations shall constitute a breach of the terms of this Agreement in the same manner as if such rules and regulations were contained herein.
18.1 Accidents
The Lessor shall not be responsible to the Lessee or to the Lessee's employees, independent contractors, agents, invitees, licensees nor to any other persons for any: -
(a) Accident, happening, injury suffered or death occurring in the Demised Premises or in the Property or,
(b) Damage to or loss of any goods or property sustained in the Demised Premises or in the Property or,
(c) Act, omission or negligence of any employee, servant, agent, independent contractor, invitee or licensee of the Lessor in respect of the Property howsoever occurring.
18.2.1 Notwithstanding anything herein contained the Lessor shall not be liable to the Lessee or others nor shall the Lessee have any claim against the Lessor in respect of: -

(a) any failure or inability of or delay by the Lessor in fulfilling any of its obligations under this Agreement or any interruption in any of the services herein agreed to be provided by the Lessor by reason of necessary repair or maintenance of any installation or apparatus or damage thereto or destruction thereof by fire, water, act of god, or any other cause beyond the control of the Lessor or by reason of mechanical or other defect or breakdown or by reason of a strike of workmen or others or a shortage of fuel, material, water or labor,

(b)any act, omission, default, misconduct or negligence of any porter, attendant or other servant or employee, independent contractor or agent of the Lessor in or about the performance or purported performance of any duty relating to the provision of the services to be provided by the Lessor under this Agreement or,
(c) any damage, injury or loss arising out of the leakage or defect of the piping, wiring or sprinkler system in the Property and/or the structure of the building or,
(d) any damage, injury or loss caused by other lessees, occupiers or persons in the Property or,
(e) any damage, injury or loss arising from or in connection with the use of the car parks in the Property.

Provided always that any act, omission, default, misconduct or negligence of any contractor, nominated or approved by the Lessor pursuant to any provision in this Agreement, and any such contractor so appointed shall not be deemed to be an agent or employee of the Lessor.

If the Lessee continues to occupy the Demised Premises beyond the expiration or determination of the Term or fails to deliver vacant possession thereof to the Lessor after the expiration or determination of the Term with the Lessor's acquiescence and without any express agreement between the Lessor and Lessee, the Lessee shall do so as a monthly Lessee and shall pay to the Lessor for every month of such holding over double the amount of Rent and Service Charge, and such holding over shall not constitute a renewal of this Agreement and there shall be no renewal of this Agreement by operation of law or pursuant to the provisions of this Agreement.

During the period of such holding over all other provisions of this Agreement shall be and remain in effect. This Agreement shall be determinable at any time by either party giving to the other one (1) months’ notice in writing before the expiry of existing Agreement. The provision herein shall not be construed as the Lessor's consent for the Lessee to hold over after the expiration or determination of the Term.

p.strong: REMOVAL OF PROPERTY AFTER DETERMINATION OF TERM

div.p: If at such time as the Lessee has vacated the Demised Premises after the determination of this Agreement, any property of the Lessee which remain in or on the Demised Premises and the Lessee fails to remove the same within seven (7) days after being requested by the Lessor to do so by a notice to that effect, then the Lessor may as the agent of the Lessee dispose it without any claims whatsoever from the Lessee.

p.strong: LESSOR'S RIGHT IN RELATION TO THE PROPERTY.

div.p: 21.1 The Lessor shall have the right at all times without obtaining the prior consent from the Lessee to alter, reconstruct or modify in any way whatsoever or change the use of any part or parts of the Property (including all fixtures, fittings, machinery and apparatus therein and thereto), so long as proper means and access to and egress from the Demised Premises are afforded and essential services are maintained at all times.

Nothing contained in this Agreement shall confer on the Lessee any right to enforce any covenant or agreement relating to other part or parts of the Property whether or not demised by the Lessor to others, or limit or affect the right of the Lessor in respect of any such other premises to deal with the same and impose and vary such terms and conditions in respect thereof as the Lessor may think fit.

p.strong: PROVIDED ALWAYS AND IT IS HEREBY AGREED AND DECLARED THAT:

div.p: 22.1 Lessor to provide the Lessee a parking place for only One (1) car in the Parking Lot.
22.1.1 The parking is restricted to the labelled one and not otherwise.
22.1.2 Any obstruction or wrong parking shall amount to trespass with consequences.
22.1.3 Parking allocated shall be at car owner’s risk and not the liability of the Lessor or the management.
22.1.4 The parking lot allocated shall not be used as a garage or any other activities but shall be used as a car park only.

22.2 The Lessor shall not be responsible nor liable for any loss, damage, security or safe keeping of the Lessee’s goods, property or the goods or property of its guests or clients in the Property or the Demised Premises.

23.1 The Lessee shall indemnify and keep indemnified and hold harmless the Lessor from any losses, damages, claims, demands, proceedings, actions, costs, expenses, interests and penalties suffered or incurred by the Lessor arising from any claim, demand, proceedings or actions that may be made or instituted by the Authorities in respect of Demised premises resulting from the failure or delay on the part of the Lessee in the payment and discharge of any taxes, levies or

23.2 The Lessee shall indemnify the Lessor against all damages, losses, costs (including all legal costs incurred by the lessor), expenses, actions proceedings, claims and liabilities made against or suffered or incurred by the Lessor arising directly out of:

a) Any act, omission or negligence of the Lessee, the Lessee’s employees, customers or agents at the Demised Premises expressly or impliedly with or without the Lessee’s authority and under the Lessee’s control or,
b) Any breach or non-observance by the Lessee of the convents, conditions or other provisions of this Agreement or any other related matters. Such acts shall amount to immediate termination.

c) Overflow or leakage of water (including rain water) in or from the Demised Premises or any equipment or fixtures therein or caused or contributed to by any act, omission, default, negligence or breach on the part of the Lessee, its employees, agents, contractors, invitees, sub-lessees, licensees or other persons as aforesaid.

d)loss, damage or injury from any cause whatsoever to property or person caused or contributed to by the use of the Demised Premises by Lessee or its employees, agents, contractors, invitees, sub-lessees, licensees or other persons as aforesaid.

e)loss, damage or injury from any cause whatsoever to property or person occasioned or contributed to by any act, omission, default, negligence or breach on the part of the Lessee or its employees, agents, contractors, invitees, sub-lessees, licensees or other persons as aforesaid.
If any one of the following occurs;
(a) A rent payment or any other payment due from Lessee to Lessor is delayed and remain unpaid in whole or in part for a period of thirty (30) days after same is due and payable,

(b)Lessee violates or defaults on any of the covenants in this Agreement and such violations or default continue for a period of thirty (30) days after written notice from the Lessor of such violation or default,

The Lessor shall terminate this Agreement and forfeit the Security deposit which shall not be limited to attach and sell of the Lessee properties that the Lessor may deem necessary to use to recover outstanding rent and other charges due. The Lessor shall also exercise any other remedies available at their disposal under the law.

24.1 Either Party may by giving one (1) month written notice assigning reasons, terminate this Agreement, reasons which should not be unreasonably withheld, and any advance amount paid for the unexpired period of the Lease shall be refunded after deducting all the taxes paid and any damages assessed.

24.2 In the event that the Lessee shall desire to terminate this Agreement before the expiry of the first Six Months of commencement of the Agreement the Lessee shall pay to the Lessor the monthly rental instalments for the full months of one (1) month from the date of the commencement of the Agreement. Failure of which the Lessor shall have the right to exercise distress and or invoke any other provisions of this Agreement in order to recover the amount.

p.strong: Yielding up at the end of the Term

div.p: At the end or sooner determination of the term hereby created,
(i) To surrender to the Lessor all keys giving access to all parts of the Demised Premises irrespective of whether the same have been supplied by the Lessor,

(ii) Quietly to yield up the Demised Premises and the Lessor's fittings and fixtures to the reasonable satisfaction of the Lessor (after removal of all Lessee’s fittings which during the term and with the Demised Premises repaired and cleaned in accordance with the Lessee's covenants contained in this Agreement),

(iii) Without prejudice to the generality of the foregoing provisions, to reinstate all air-conditioning installations, sprinkler system and other electrical and electronic installations therein to its original condition to the reasonable satisfaction of the Lessor, such reinstatement work and all other reinstatement works as required under this Agreement shall be carried out at the Lessee's costs and expense by a contractor appointed by the Lessee and approved by the Lessor,

(iv)To redecorate the Premises to the reasonable satisfaction of the Lessor, with two coats of good quality oil paint or emulsion paint and with wall paper for those part normally wall papered and other appropriate treatment of all internal parts of the Demised Premises including the ceiling and floor in a good workmanlike manner using suitable and appropriate materials as the Lessor may reasonably and properly require,

(v)At any time upon the written request of the Lessor, to remove any signs, names, advertisements or notices erected upon or affixed to, within or outside the Demised Premises or the exterior walls of the building and to make good any damage or disfigurement caused by reason of such erection, affixing and/or removal thereof,

(vi)To keep the Demised premises in a good state of repair and condition and to repair any damage to the Demised Premises caused by the Lessee, its employees, agents, clients or third parties either within or outside the scope of the Lessee’s business activities.

The Lessee shall pay to the Lessor all legal costs (on an indemnity basis) and expenses in connection with demanding and/or enforcing any provision of this Agreement in the event of non-compliance or breach by the Lessee, or in connection with any claim for damages by the Lessor in respect of any breach of this Agreement by the Lessee.

To permit the Lessor during the one (1) month immediately preceding the determination of this Agreement to affix and retain without interference upon any part of the Demised Premises a notice for re-letting or selling the same and during the said period to permit all persons with written authority from the Lessor or its agents at reasonable time of the day upon prior appointment to view the Premises.

28.1 Any notice required or permitted to be given or made under this Agreement and any other Agreement between the Parties shall be in writing, and any such notice shall be deemed to have been duly given or made when it shall be delivered by hand or by post, telegram, cable, email, fax or telex to the Party to which it is required or permitted to be given or made at such Party’s address specified in this Agreement or at such other address as such Party shall have designated by notice to the Party giving such notice.
28.2For the purpose of service of notice under Clause 28.0 hereinabove the addresses of the Parties are as set out herein below:

During the subsistence of this Agreement, each Party and/or its affiliate(s) shall receive and maintain all confidential information in the strictest confidence that upon disclosure of any information by the Lessee it shall amount to breach of the contractual terms and the Lessor shall be entitled to review the terms and conditions herein including increase of Rent amount and shall have a right to forfeit the Security Deposit and impose any other penalties that it may deem fit and reasonable depending on the extent of damage suffered due to disclosure of information contained herein by the Lessee, its assignees, agents, suppliers or employees or any other person who may have access to this Agreement.

Each Party and/or its affiliate(s) shall limit disclosure of any confidential information to those of its employees, agents, and representatives on a need - to-know basis. Either Party prior to making disclosure of any confidential information shall exert best efforts to cause the receiving entity(ies) to execute papers and documents to effect substantial compliance with the provisions of this clause.

In case Party and/or its affiliate(s) or any of their employees, agents or representatives, becomes legally compelled to disclose any confidential information, such Party shall give sufficient notice to the other Party so as to permit such other Party to seek a timely protective order or other appropriate relief. If such order or order relief cannot be obtained, the Party being compelled to make disclosure shall only make disclosure of that which is legally required and no more.

The obligation of confidentiality in respect of confidential information shall not apply to confidential information, which is now in, or hereafter comes into, the public domain otherwise than by breach of this Agreement.

Each Party and/or its affiliate(s) shall make only such notes, sketches, drawings, photocopies or other written or photographic records relating to all confidential information as are necessary. All such materials shall belong to the Party and/or its affiliates to which the confidential information relates and, together with all other tangible expressions of confidential information held by any Party and/or its affiliates(s) shall be returned to the owner forthwith upon the termination of this Agreement.

For the purpose of this contract “Force Majeure” means an event which is beyond the reasonable control of a Party and which makes a Party’s performance of its obligations hereunder impossible or so impracticable as reasonably to be considered impossible under the circumstances and includes, but is not limited to Government Gazette Notice, war, earthquakes, fire, explosion, storm flood or other adverse weather conditions, strikes, lockouts or other industrial action (except where such invoking Force Majeure to prevent), confiscation or any other action by Government agencies.
Force Majeure shall not include.
i) Any event, which is caused by the negligence or intentional acts of the Parties.

ii) Any event in which a diligent Party could reasonably have been expected to take both into consideration at the time of conclusion of this Contract and avoid or overcome in the performance of its obligation herein.

The failure of either Party to fulfil any of its obligations shall not be considered as breach or default under this contract in so far as such inability that may arise from an event of Force Majeure provided that the Party affected by an event has taken all the reasonable precaution, due care and the alternative measures with the objective of carrying out the terms and conditions of this Agreement.
i) Either Party affected by an event of Force Majeure shall take all the reasonable measures to remove such inability to fulfil its obligation with minimum of delay.
ii) The affected Party shall give thirty (30) days’ notice as to the occurrence and evidence of the event and specify measure taken to restore the situation.
iii) The Parties shall take all reasonable measures to minimize the consequences of any occurrence of Force Majeure.

The Lessee at its own costs and written notice to the Lessor, may be permitted subjecttoLessor’s consentand approval to alter the interior of the Demised Premises in accordance with its standard interior decor including installation of additional partitioning. in case of such undertaking, Lessee shall comply with all building codes and by-laws when altering the interior of the demised premises.

32.1 If any dispute arises in connection with this Agreement, both parties shall, within fourteen (14) days of a written request from one party to the other, meet in good faith to resolve the dispute.

32.2 If the dispute is not resolved at that meeting, the parties will attempt to settle it by arbitration, however, incase of a dispute involving non-payment of rent, service and utility charges, and the amounts are in arrears of more than one month, the Lessor shall take the possession of the Demised premises and exercise distress or other legal means to recover the amount in arrears, for avoidance of doubt the cause for relief through arbitration shall not apply in recovery of rental and other payments in arrears.

33.1This Agreement shall be legally binding, and all negotiations and any legal agreements prepared in connection with it and any dispute or claim arising out of or in connection with them or their formation (including non-contractual disputes or claims) shall be governed by, and construed in accordance with the laws of the United Republic of Tanzania.

33.2 In the event of any dispute arising between the Parties in relation to or arising out of this Agreement other than rental, service charges, utility charges and other payments in arrears (defaults), the Parties shall upon receipt of a notice in writing from the Party claiming such dispute, attempt to resolve the dispute through good faith negotiations. If the Parties are unable to settle the dispute, the matter shall be exclusively referred to and finally resolved by arbitration in accordance to the Arbitration Act (CAP 15 R.E2020) which Rules are deemed to be incorporated by reference into this clause.

33.3 The Arbitration shall be by one Arbitrator appointed by the Tanzania Institute of Arbitrators (TIA). The choice of arbitrator shall be final and binding on the Parties and the venue of the arbitration shall be in Dar es Salaam conducted in the English language.

33.4 The Parties undertake that all arbitral proceedings conducted shall be kept strictly confidential as well as all Confidential Information disclosed therein which shall be used solely for those proceedings.
No failure or delay by any Party to exercise any of his rights herein shall operate as a waiver thereof nor shall any single or partial exercise of any such right preclude further exercise thereof.
The provisions of this Agreement may be amended from time to time by the Parties and such modifications as the Lessor and Lessee may agree shall be in writing and supplemental to this Agreement.
If a substantial portion of the Properties of the Lessee on the Demised premises at any time during the term are;
(i) Seized or taken in execution or attachment by a creditor of the Lessee,
(ii) or a receiver manager is appointed to control the conduct of the business of the Lessee at the Demised Premises or,
(iii) If the Lessee becomes bankrupt or insolvent or an order is made for the winding up of the Lessee business or,

The Lessor shall be at the option of exercising his rights by written notice to the Lessee and forthwith determine this Agreement, rent will be recovered in the manner herein reserved as if the same rent was in arrears.

The Lessee has read and understood all the terms and conditions of this Agreement and undertakes to abide by them at all times. The Lessee understands that the Demised Premises are part of a property where the rights of other lessees may be affected if he fails to conform to the terms and conditions of this Agreement.

The Lessee acknowledges that notwithstanding its investments, the Lessee does not have an automatic right to remain in the Demised Premises after the expiration of the Term. The Lessee agrees undertakes that he will vacate the Demised Premises and surrender them to the Lessor immediately upon expiration or earlier termination of this Agreement.

The Lessee will not dispute the Lessor's right to terminate this Agreement, or to allow it to expire according to its terms and conditions. The Lessee acknowledges that it has entered into this Agreement after obtaining independent legal advice in respect of the Party’s rights and obligations under this Lease.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF
this Agreement has been executed and delivered as in the manner and on the date and year appearing.

td.p:
SEALED with the COMMON SEAL of [LANDLORD] and DELIVERED
in our presence on This__________day of__________, 2023.

SEALED with the COMMON SEAL of [TENANT] and DELIVERED
in our presence on This__________day of__________, 2023.
